ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview or summary of the movie */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated for the movie */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the movie's release */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the movie (e.g., Released, In Production) */,
  "poster_path" TEXT /* Path to the movie's poster image */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average user rating for the movie */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of user votes for the movie */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* A short marketing tagline for the movie */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the production started */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the production ended */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distributor */,
  "international_release_date" TEXT /* Date of international release */,
  "domestic_revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated domestically */,
  "international_revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated internationally */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for historical tracking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES distributors ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collection was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collection was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_collections" (
  "movie_collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-collection relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_collections_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_collections_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES collections ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-genre relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the production company is based */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_companies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES production_countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_production_companies" (
  "movie_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-production company relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_production_companies_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES production_companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_production_companies_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production country */,
  "iso_3166_1" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for the country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_production_countries" (
  "movie_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-production country relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_production_countries_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_production_countries_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES production_countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spoken_languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spoken language */,
  "iso_639_1" TEXT /* ISO 639-1 alpha-2 code for the language */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_spoken_languages" (
  "movie_language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-spoken language relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spoken language */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_spoken_languages_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_spoken_languages_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES spoken_languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., producer, distributor, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the movie */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the distributor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the distributor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)
